turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Here is a scenario. I am speaking with an academic advisor or career counselor to get guidance about my current study plans or future career options. I want to explain my situation, ask for advice and clarify next steps, practice speaking clearly and professionally in a formal setting.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I will need to define the chatbot's role as a university advisor or career counselor.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'm studying graphic design right now, but I'm not sure if it's the right fit.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, I like design, but not graphic design, I think, because I'm afraid the AI, with the development of AI, I'm afraid the AI will replace my workplace in the future.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to go to the international company like...”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I don't know, but I'm thinking about, should I need to, if I will go to the international company, like the big scale international company, should I need to graduate from bachelor degree and apply the master degree?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And also, how can I decide between doing future study or starting work after graduation?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What should I do now if I want to apply for an internship next year?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, sounds good. Thank you. Thank you for your help.”
